product: Share foreign Iceberg tables with Delta Sharing (Public Preview)
tagline: You can now share foreign Iceberg tables federated from foreign Iceberg catalogs using Delta Sharing.
what_it_does: You can now share foreign Iceberg tables federated from foreign Iceberg catalogs using Delta Sharing. Providers can add foreign Iceberg tables to a share, and recipients access the shared data in read only format. This page explains how to create shares for OpenSharing.
why_it_matters: For Databricks to Databricks shares, the table's Delta log is also shared to improve performance.
plain_summary: You can now share foreign Iceberg tables federated from foreign Iceberg catalogs using Delta Sharing. Providers can add foreign Iceberg tables to a share, and recipients access the shared data in read only format.
key_takeaway: You can now share foreign Iceberg tables federated from foreign Iceberg catalogs using Delta Sharing.
